mnemonics: TEST IoT Components: Think of a doctor checking a patient's Vitals, Sensors, and Treatment (VST).
keyPoints: Verification ensures the component meets its design specifications.
Sensors and data accuracy are critical points of failure to test.
Testing must cover various environments and stress conditions the component will face.
commonMistakes: Testing only in ideal lab conditions, ignoring real-world environmental factors.
Focusing solely on functional testing and neglecting security and performance testing.
Not testing for interoperability with other devices and systems.
